task_prompt: Run all R scripts in the Code folder.
tasks: From the Fig1B.pdf plot results, what is the y-axis label?

From the fixed-effects logistic regression results in TableS9, what is the odds ratio for Democrat vs. Republican committee control on science citation? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.

From the permutation null model results in Fig2A (Congress), what is the expected bipartisan share of all papers with policy citations? Report as a proportion and only the number rounded to three decimal places.
